title: Terraform SSM Parameter Store module
description: Terraform module that creates SSM Parameter Store entries for all environment variables the Lambda functions need. Values are placeholders — real values are set manually after apply. Secrets use SecureString type.

acceptance_criteria.then: all values are placeholders (CHANGE_ME or similar) — no real secrets are committed
it documents the command to set real values for each parameter

non_functional_requirements.security: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and any other secrets must be SecureString. Never commit real values. Placeholder values must be obviously fake.

definition_of_done: All required parameters created with correct types
Placeholder values only — no real secrets
README documents how to set real values
agent_instructions: Read .claude/constitutions/terraform.md before writing any .tf files. Never use real secret values — always use CHANGE_ME or similar placeholder. SecureString type must be used for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and any other credentials. Write a README section documenting the aws ssm put-parameter commands to set real values.
